creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
^Triage: Looks like melifaro@ bought this/these back in in base r356984

# sysctl -a |grep rr_prune
net.inet6.ip6.rr_prune: 5
#sysctl -a |grep redirtimeout
net.inet.icmp.redirtimeout: 600
net.inet6.icmp6.redirtimeout: 600


Closing OBE accordingly. Please re-open if not appropriate with additional detail
